tests.name: LED Status Indicator - Running State
tests.description: LED should show green pulse animation when robot is running

tests.name: LED Status Indicator - Stopped State
tests.description: LED should show solid red when robot is stopped

tests.name: LED Status Indicator - Warning State
tests.description: LED should blink yellow when reconnecting

tests.name: Tab Navigation - Overview
tests.description: Overview tab should display correctly

tests.name: Tab Navigation - Analysis
tests.description: Analysis tab should display chart and scanner

tests.name: Tab Navigation - Trades
tests.description: Trades tab should display active trades and history

tests.name: Tab Navigation - Logs
tests.description: Logs tab should display terminal output

tests.name: Tab Navigation - Settings
tests.description: Settings tab should display configuration options

tests.name: Tab State Persistence
tests.description: Last active tab should be saved and restored

tests.name: Robot Selector - Display
tests.description: Robot selector should show current robot with icon

tests.name: Robot Selector - Switching
tests.description: Switching robots should update UI without page refresh

tests.name: Robot Selector - Status Updates
tests.description: Robot status should update every second

tests.name: Error Handling - Auto Retry
tests.description: Connection errors should trigger auto-retry (max 3)
checks: Fallback to polling after max attempts

tests.name: Error Handling - Offline Overlay
tests.description: Offline overlay should appear when connection lost

tests.name: Error Handling - Polling Fallback
tests.description: Polling should work when WebSocket fails

tests.name: Performance - 60 FPS
tests.description: UI should maintain 60 FPS during updates

tests.name: Performance - Debounce/Throttle
tests.description: Scroll and resize events should be debounced/throttled

tests.name: Performance - Lazy Loading
tests.description: Inactive tabs should not load content
checks: Tab content loads on first switch
Chart only initializes in Analysis tab

tests.name: Responsive - Desktop (1200px+)
tests.description: Layout should work correctly on desktop

tests.name: Responsive - Tablet (768px)
tests.description: Layout should adapt to tablet screens

tests.name: Responsive - Mobile (480px)
tests.description: Layout should work on mobile devices

tests.name: Styling - Dark Theme
tests.description: Dark theme should be applied consistently

tests.name: Styling - Animations
tests.description: Animations should be smooth and performant

tests.name: Accordion - Functionality
tests.description: Accordion sections should expand/collapse

tests.name: Toast Notifications
tests.description: Toast notifications should display correctly
